recommendations.title: Rudolph's Shiny New Year
recommendations.genres: Animation, Fantasy, Family, TV Movie, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Rudolph must find Happy, the baby new year, before the midnight of New Year's Eve.

recommendations.title: The Hobbit
recommendations.genres: Family, Fantasy, Animation, Adventure, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: The story follows the adventures of Bilbo Baggins, a diminutive creative who resides in a place called Middle-Earth before he is compelled to go on a quest to find a treasure buried deep in the heart of the Lonely Mountain.

recommendations.title: The Little Drummer Boy
recommendations.overview: After being kidnapped and escaping, young drummer boy Aaron searches for his camel and finds him in the Nativity of the Baby Jesus. Aaron gives Baby Jesus the only gift he has, a song on his drum.
recommendations.director: Takeo Nakamura, Arthur Rankin, Jr., Jules Bass
